questions.question: What is the name of the fictional Los Angeles skyscraper where NYPD detective John McClane fights terrorists on Christmas Eve in the 1988 film 'Die Hard'?
What is the specific alphanumeric model number of the original cybernetic assassin played by Arnold Schwarzenegger in the 1984 sci-fi action film 'The Terminator'?
What is the civilian birth name of the hacker protagonist played by Keanu Reeves before he adopts the alias 'Neo' in the 1999 action film 'The Matrix'?
What specific breed of dog is the puppy named Daisy, whose tragic death sets off John Wick's violent quest for vengeance in the 2014 action film?
In the 1981 adventure film 'Raiders of the Lost Ark', Indiana Jones races against the Nazis to locate which legendary, gold-plated biblical artifact?
What is the fictional military call sign of Pete Mitchell, the elite naval aviator played by Tom Cruise in the 1986 action drama 'Top Gun'?
What is the name of the tyrannical, mask-wearing warlord who controls the water supply in the 2015 post-apocalyptic action film 'Mad Max: Fury Road'?
What is the name of the international terrorist organization traditionally led by the villain Ernst Stavro Blofeld in the classic James Bond film franchise?
What is the first name of the betrayed Roman general played by Russell Crowe who becomes a vengeful arena fighter in the 2000 epic 'Gladiator'?
In the 1994 high-concept action thriller 'Speed', a city transit bus is rigged with a bomb that will detonate if the vehicle's speed drops below how many miles per hour?
What is the full name of the troubled Vietnam War veteran and elite Green Beret soldier played by Sylvester Stallone in 'First Blood'?
What is the iconic color of the matching, striped motorcycle jumpsuit worn by Uma Thurman's character during her sword fights in 'Kill Bill: Volume 1'?
Liam Neeson says he has a 'very particular set of __________' in 'Taken.
What is the name of the fictional Costa Rican island where a billionaire builds a disastrous theme park filled with cloned dinosaurs in the 1993 film 'Jurassic Park'?
What is the specific name of the six powerful, color-coded cosmic gems that the warlord Thanos seeks to collect in the Marvel Studios film 'Avengers: Infinity War'?
What is the first name of the amnesiac black-ops assassin played by Matt Damon in a film franchise based on novels by Robert Ludlum?
In the 1998 buddy-cop action comedy 'Rush Hour', Inspector Lee travels to Los Angeles from which major Asian city to investigate a high-profile kidnapping?
What is the last name of the volatile, grief-stricken LAPD narcotics detective played by Mel Gibson in the 1987 buddy-cop classic 'Lethal Weapon'?
The 1987 sci-fi action film 'RoboCop' takes place in a crime-ridden, dystopian version of which major Midwestern United States city?
The high-octane action franchise 'Bad Boys', starring Will Smith and Martin Lawrence as narcotics detectives, is set in which major Florida city?
In James Cameron's 2009 sci-fi action film 'Avatar', human military forces invade a lush, habitable moon known by what name?
In the 1997 John Woo action film 'Face/Off', John Travolta plays an FBI agent who undergoes an experimental surgery to swap faces with a terrorist played by which actor?
In the 1996 action film 'Independence Day', humanity launches a desperate counter-attack against an invading alien force on which specific date in July?
What is the first name of the elite secret agent played by Tom Cruise in the 'Mission: Impossible' film franchise?
What color is the pill that Morpheus offers Neo to reveal the true reality of the world in 'The Matrix'?
What is the last name of the retired legendary hitman played by Keanu Reeves in a neon-lit, high-octane film franchise?
What is the name of the Norse god of thunder played by Chris Hemsworth in the Marvel Studios action films?
What is the name of the cold, calculating German terrorist villain played by Alan Rickman in the original 'Die Hard'?
In the 1991 action sequel 'Terminator 2', Arnold Schwarzenegger's character returns to protect a young boy named John with what last name?
What secret agent code number is assigned to James Bond?
What specific type of flexible, leather weapon is famously used by Indiana Jones to swing across gaps and disarm enemies?
What is the name of the fierce, one-armed rebel warrior captain played by Charlize Theron in 'Mad Max: Fury Road'?
What is the name of the corrupt, patricidal Roman emperor played by Joaquin Phoenix in the 2000 historical action epic 'Gladiator'?
In the 2008 action thriller 'Taken', Liam Neeson's daughter is kidnapped while on vacation in which major European capital city?
What is the last name of the legendary Japanese swordsmith who crafts the masterwork katana for the Bride in 'Kill Bill'?
What is the military nickname of Major Alan Schaefer, the rescue team leader played by Arnold Schwarzenegger in 'Predator'?
What is the last name of the fast-talking LAPD detective James, played by comedian Chris Tucker in the 'Rush Hour' franchise?
What is the first name of the passenger played by Sandra Bullock who is forced to drive the runaway bus in 'Speed'?
What is the last name of the smooth-talking 'chaos theorist' mathematician played by Jeff Goldblum in 'Jurassic Park'?
What is the last name of Roger, the veteran, family-man LAPD homicide detective played by Danny Glover in 'Lethal Weapon'?
What is the last name of Alex, the Detroit police officer who is brutally gunned down and rebuilt into the cyborg 'RoboCop'?
What is the last name of Marcus, the anxious and family-oriented Miami narcotics detective played by Martin Lawrence in 'Bad Boys'?
What is the first name of the paraplegic former Marine played by Sam Worthington who operates a Na'vi body in 'Avatar'?
What is the fictional military call sign of Tom Kazansky, Maverick's elite rival pilot played by Val Kilmer in 'Top Gun'?
Which actor won a posthumous Academy Award for his legendary portrayal of the Joker in the 2008 action film 'The Dark Knight'?
What is the full name of the rookie FBI agent and former football player played by Keanu Reeves in 'Point Break'?
What is the first name of the billionaire industrialist who builds a high-tech suit of armor to become Iron Man?
In the 2004 action-packed spy sequel 'The Bourne Supremacy', Jason Bourne travels to which capital city of Germany to uncover his past?
What is the first name of Cameron, the honorably discharged Army Ranger played by Nicolas Cage who traps himself on a hijacked prison plane in 'Con Air'?
What is the name of the exclusive, international hotel chain that serves as a neutral safe haven for the criminal underworld in the 'John Wick' franchise?
In the 1989 action-adventure film 'Indiana Jones and the Last Crusade', Indy races against time to discover which mythical, life-giving chalice?
What is the name of the resistance leader played by Laurence Fishburne who frees Neo from the machine-controlled simulation in 'The Matrix'?
What is the first name of the upbeat, chatty limousine driver who waits out the entire terrorist siege in the Nakatomi parking garage in 'Die Hard'?
What alphanumeric model designation is given to the shapeshifting, liquid-metal assassin played by Robert Patrick in 'Terminator 2: Judgment Day'?

What is the tragic military call sign of Nick Bradshaw, Maverick's beloved Radar Intercept Officer and best friend in 'Top Gun'?
What is the full civilian name of the high school student bitten by a genetically modified spider in Sam Raimi's 2002 superhero action film?
In the original 'Mad Max' film franchise, Max Rockatansky drives a heavily modified black pursuit muscle car known by what specific name?
What is the name of the grizzled, elderly gladiator trainer and promoter played by Oliver Reed in the 2000 historical action epic 'Gladiator'?
What is the name of Bill's brother, the trailer-dwelling former assassin played by Michael Madsen who buries the Bride alive in 'Kill Bill: Volume 2'?
What is the first name of Bryan Mills' ex-wife, played by Famke Janssen, whose daughter's kidnapping sets off the action in 'Taken'?
What is the last name of Howard, the disgruntled ex-cop and bomb maker who plays a deadly game with LAPD SWAT in the 1994 film 'Speed'?
What is the shortened common name of the highly intelligent, pack-hunting dinosaur species that opens kitchen doors in 'Jurassic Park'?
In the 'Lethal Weapon' movies, what is the first name of the volatile and unpredictable partner paired with Detective Roger Murtaugh?
What is the first name of the ruthless, cackling street gang leader played by Kurtwood Smith who executes Alex Murphy in 'RoboCop'?
In the opening scene of the 1995 action movie 'Bad Boys', Mike Lowrey famously drives a sports car made by which German manufacturer?
What is the last name of the ruthless military colonel and security chief who serves as the main antagonist in James Cameron's 'Avatar'?
What is the last name of the honest Gotham City police lieutenant played by Gary Oldman in the 2008 film 'The Dark Knight'?
In the 1991 action thriller 'Point Break', Johnny Utah infiltrates a gang of bank robbers who disguise themselves using rubber masks of what?
What is the nickname of Tony Stark's loyal assistant and eventual romantic partner, played by Gwyneth Paltrow in the MCU?

What is the last name of the hotshot Marine fighter pilot Captain Steven, played by Will Smith in the 1996 film 'Independence Day'?
In the 1998 action comedy 'Rush Hour', Inspector Lee is called to Los Angeles because the daughter of which Chinese diplomat has been kidnapped?
What is the last name of the obsessive LAPD robbery-homicide detective Vincent, played by Al Pacino in the 1995 crime action epic 'Heat'?
In the 2006 action thriller 'Casino Royale', James Bond enters a high-stakes tournament of which specific poker variant to bankrupt a terrorist financier?
What is the acronym of the US federal law enforcement agency that employs Emily Blunt's character, Kate Macer, at the start of 'Sicario'?
What is the iconic musical instrument nickname of the tough-as-nails inspector played by Chow Yun-fat in John Woo's 1992 masterpiece 'Hard Boiled'?
In the 1993 mountain rescue action thriller 'Cliffhanger', Sylvester Stallone plays a ranger who is forced to locate stolen briefcases filled with what?
What is the poetic, two-word name of the legendary 400-year-old green jade sword that is stolen in 'Crouching Tiger, Hidden Dragon'?
What is the code name of the unlucky, bucket-hat-wearing assassin played by Brad Pitt in the 2022 stylized action comedy 'Bullet Train'?
In Paul Verhoeven's 1990 sci-fi action film 'Total Recall', Arnold Schwarzenegger's character uncovers a massive conspiracy on which planet?
In Edgar Wright's high-speed 2017 action film 'Baby Driver', the young getaway driver relies on what specific item to drown out his severe tinnitus?
What is the first name of the deadly, book-reading retired intelligence operative played by Denzel Washington in 'The Equalizer'?
In the 2002 sci-fi action thriller 'Minority Report', Tom Cruise operates a Washington D.C. police department known by what specialized name?
What is the name of the traditional, devastating Southeast Asian martial art used by Tony Jaa to retrieve a stolen village statue head in 'Ong-Bak'?
What is the last name of the cynical, rule-breaking San Francisco inspector played by Clint Eastwood in the 1971 classic crime action film?
What is the first name of Tyler, the fearless black-market mercenary played by Chris Hemsworth in the relentless 2020 action film 'Extraction'?
In the futuristic 1993 sci-fi action film 'Demolition Man', what is the name of the lone fast-food chain left on Earth after winning the franchise wars?
In Michael Bay's 1996 action thriller 'The Rock', rogue military forces seize control of which notorious, isolated former federal prison island?
What is the last name of James, the decisive United States President played by Harrison Ford who takes on hijackers aboard his official plane?
In the 2012 sci-fi action film 'Dredd', Karl Urban plays a futuristic law enforcer who holds the combined power of police, judge, jury, and what else?
In the 1992 naval action thriller 'Under Siege', Steven Seagal plays a deadly former Navy SEAL who is currently assigned to work as what on the battleship?
What is the first name of Hutch, the suburban family man with a hidden black-ops past played by Bob Odenkirk in the 2021 action film 'Nobody'?
The 2011 martial arts action masterpiece 'The Raid: Redemption' follows an elite tactical squad as they storm a high-rise apartment building in which Asian capital city?
What is the last name of the guilt-ridden former CIA operative John, played by Denzel Washington, who wages war on kidnappers in 'Man on Fire'?
What is the name of the rival, aggressive karate dojo led by Sensei John Kreese that opposes Daniel LaRusso in the original 1984 martial arts action drama?
